text.title: Annual Planning Process Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example walking from inputs through the procedure to a validated `spec` artefact. Illustrates how the rules in 01-core-rules.xml constrain the output and how the validator behaves on an OK input.

list.item: Owner: named human with role and signoff authority.
Evidence: at least one link with a claim string ≥ 3 chars.
Prior artefact (optional): previous instance for diff.

section.title: Worked artefact (abbreviated)

list.item: Run: python3 scripts/validate-ops-annual-planning-process.py --file artefact.json → exit 0, prints OK.
Mutate `owner` to a string `"team"` → exit 1, prints VIOLATION lines for `$.owner: expected object`.
Run python3 scripts/validate-ops-annual-planning-process.py --self-test → exit 0 against the embedded fixtures.

section.title: Outcome review
section.p: After two cadence cycles, compare the operating signal targeted by this methodology against baseline. If the artefact did not change behaviour, propose deprecation per step 7 of the procedure.
